description: Opportunity for undergraduate and postgraduate students to work on projects related to space science, technology, and applications.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, or M.Sc students with a minimum of 70% marks or 7.5 CGPA.
whoCanApply: Pre-final and final year students of recognized Indian universities.
stipend: Unpaid (Academic credit and training certificate provided)

description: Offers students hands-on research experience in state-of-the-art defense laboratories working on advanced military technologies.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech students with consistent academic record of 65% or above.
whoCanApply: Pre-final and final year students pursuing engineering and science courses.
stipend: Unpaid (Access to high-tech lab equipment and research mentorship)
requiredDocuments: Recommendation Letter from Head of Institution

description: Practical training exposure in heavy electrical equipment manufacturing, power plant engineering, and manufacturing operations.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech students in core branches with no active backlogs.
whoCanApply: Engineering students who have completed their 6th semester.
stipend: Unpaid (Provides industry training certificate and exposure)
requiredDocuments: College Request Letter for Industrial Training

description: Enables students to learn professional skills in radar systems, defense communication, and semiconductor equipment systems.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech or Diploma students from recognized Indian colleges.
whoCanApply: Recent graduates or final-year engineering and diploma students.

description: Technical training program focusing on aircraft design, helicopter assemblies, aero-engine manufacturing, and avionic systems.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in aerospace, mechanical, electronics, or computer science streams.
whoCanApply: Third and fourth-year engineering students from approved institutes.

description: Provides exposure to thermal power generation, green energy operations, control and instrumentation, and electrical grid systems.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech engineering students with a minimum score of 60% aggregate.
whoCanApply: Students in their pre-final year of electrical, mechanical, or instrumentation engineering.

description: Technical internship in high-voltage transmission networks, substation operations, and smart grid automation tech.
eligibility: Undergraduate engineering students with 6.5 CGPA and above.
whoCanApply: Pre-final year electrical and electronics engineering students.

description: In-depth industrial exposure in petroleum exploration, drilling technology, oil field operations, and pipeline logistics.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech or M.Tech students in engineering or geology fields.
whoCanApply: Pre-final year students pursuing engineering, earth sciences, or applied physics.
stipend: Unpaid (Certified field training and report validation)

description: Industrial training in railway signaling systems, traction motors, carriage manufacturing, and digital network routers.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech or Diploma in engineering streams.
whoCanApply: Undergraduate engineering students who have completed 2nd or 3rd year.

organization: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT)
description: Focuses on hands-on development in microprocessor architectures, Internet of Things, cyber security, and VLSI systems.
eligibility: Undergraduate students pursuing computer science, electronics, or IT degree.
whoCanApply: Second, third, and final-year B.E./B.Tech/MCA/B.Sc IT students.
stipend: Unpaid (Includes practical lab training and certification)

organization: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC)
description: Collaborate on supercomputing architectures, artificial intelligence models, cloud platforms, and multilingual computing algorithms.
eligibility: Final-year B.Tech, M.Tech, MCA, or Ph.D. candidates with strong programming skills.
whoCanApply: Students seeking to complete their final semester project at a premier national research center.

organization: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)
description: Prestigious national program allowing students to work under scientists at CSIR laboratories on front-line research projects.
eligibility: B.Sc, M.Sc, B.Tech, or M.Tech students with high academic rankings.
whoCanApply: Outstanding science and engineering students nationwide.

internshipName: IISc Summer Fellowship in Science & Engineering
description: Prestigious program targeting SC/ST and EWS students to introduce them to state-of-the-art laboratory research environments.
eligibility: M.Sc, B.E./B.Tech students in pre-final years with high CGPA.
whoCanApply: SC/ST and economically backward students studying in recognized Indian colleges.
requiredDocuments: Recommendation letter from Head of Dept

description: Work on research projects and prototypes alongside IIT faculty and scholars inside research hubs.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech students with CGPA >= 8.0 from non-IIT institutes.
whoCanApply: Top ranking second and third-year engineering undergraduates.
stipend: Unpaid (Access to IIT labs, library, and faculty network)

description: Engage in public policy design, economic data analysis, digital governance reviews, and implementation frameworks.
eligibility: Undergraduate students studying in registered colleges with CGPA >= 7.0.
whoCanApply: Undergraduate, Postgraduate, or Research scholars.
stipend: Unpaid (High prestige policy-making exposure and certificate)
requiredDocuments: NOC in prescribed NITI layout format

description: Opportunity to analyze macroeconomics, banking regulations, digital payments systems, and monetary policies.
eligibility: Postgraduates and 5-year integrated course students in Economics, Management, or Computer streams.
whoCanApply: Students enrolled in elite postgraduate management, engineering, or statistical courses.
requiredDocuments: Detailed CV and Statement of Purpose

organization: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)
description: Provides learning experience on security markets regulation, investor safety laws, corporate finance governance, and algorithmic trade analytics.
eligibility: Securities law (LLB/LLM) or PG Management / Computer streams.
whoCanApply: Postgraduate students or law candidates in final years.

organization: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD)
description: Conduct field studies on agricultural credit, rural infrastructure programs, microfinance self-help groups, and crop insurance frameworks.
eligibility: Postgraduate students in agriculture, business management, engineering, or development sciences.
whoCanApply: Pre-final year postgraduate students of premier institutes.

organization: Nuclear Power Corporation of India Limited (NPCIL)
description: Exposes students to nuclear reactor instrumentation, mechanical turbine operations, safety systems, and radiation protection systems.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech students with CGPA >= 7.0 and no active backlogs.
whoCanApply: Pre-final year mechanical, electrical, chemical, or instrumentation engineering undergraduates.

description: Learn about gas pipeline engineering, petrochemical plants operations, compressor station mechanics, and safety control systems.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech engineering students with a minimum of 65% aggregate.
whoCanApply: Pre-final and final-year engineering students.

description: Field training at IOCL refineries in distillation units, safety measures, automation systems, and maintenance mechanics.
eligibility: Undergraduate chemical, mechanical, electrical, or instrumentation engineering students.
whoCanApply: Third and fourth-year engineering students from approved institutes.

description: Practical training in petroleum refining processes, storage setups, quality control chemistry, and instrumentation systems.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech or MBA students with >= 60% aggregate.
whoCanApply: Pre-final year engineering students or first-year MBA students.

description: Technical industrial exposure in oil refining, petroleum pipeline routing, logistics data tracking, and automation.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech engineering students with a minimum of 65% aggregate.
whoCanApply: Pre-final year students from core engineering disciplines.

description: Hands-on learning of heavy steel production, blast furnace mechanics, rolling mills automation, and structural quality testing.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech engineering students from approved colleges.
whoCanApply: Metallurgy, mechanical, electrical, chemical, or mining engineering students.

description: Gain insight into strategic electronics manufacturing, control systems, cyber security products, and defense avionics assembly.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech or Diploma students in electronics or electrical streams.
whoCanApply: Second, third, and final-year engineering/diploma undergraduates.
